detaileddescription.para: The number of texture units an implementation supports is implementation dependent, but must be at least 8.

briefdescription.para: Protected constructor so an instance of this class cannot be created.
Virtual protected destructor, no deletion through this interface.

detaileddescription.para: Invoked by Render thread before Core::Render.
Invoked by Render thread after Core::Render Inform the gl implementation that the rendering in this frame has finished, and how much time was spent.
Returns current gles can support surfaceless context @Return true current gles support surfaceless context
Returns current gles can support advanced blend equation @Return true current gles support advanced blend equation
Returns current gles can support multisampled render to texture @Return true current gles support multisampled render to texture
Returns current gles can support the blend equation @Return true current gles support the blend equation
Returns shading language version. @Return shading language version.
Returns shader prefix of shading language version. @Return shader prefix of shading language version.
Returns vertex shader prefix including shading language version. @Return vertex shader prefix including shading language version.
Returns fragment shader prefix including shading language version and extension information. @Return fragment shader prefix including shading language version and extension information.

memberdef.argsstring: (const GLenum imageGlFormat, const GLenum textureGlFormat, const bool isSubImage) const =0
memberdef.name: TextureRequiresConverting

detaileddescription.para:
Determine whether to convert pixel format or not.
imageGlFormat
GLformat of input image.
textureGlFormat
GLformat of Texture.
isSubImage
Boolian value for the whether the image is subimage or not
Whether the texture will be convert or not.

detaileddescription.para: GlAbstraction is an abstract interface, used to access OpenGL services. A concrete implementation must be created for each platform, and provided when creating the Dali::Integration::Core object.
